label: Modus tollens — contrapositive instantiation
goal: Dr. Patel is not a licensed surgeon.
seeds: All licensed surgeons have completed a surgical residency.
Dr. Patel has not completed a surgical residency.
expected_proof: If someone has not completed a surgical residency, they are not a licensed surgeon.
Dr. Patel is not a licensed surgeon.

label: Hypothetical syllogism — 3-step forward chain
goal: Customers are unable to make purchases.
seeds: If the primary server fails, the database goes offline.
If the database goes offline, transactions cannot be processed.
If transactions cannot be processed, customers are unable to make purchases.
The primary server has failed.
expected_proof: The database has gone offline.
Transactions cannot be processed.
Customers are unable to make purchases.

label: Disjunctive syllogism + consequence chain
goal: The system will be offline for maintenance.
seeds: The network outage was caused by either a hardware fault or a software bug.
All hardware components have been inspected and confirmed fully functional.
If the outage was caused by a software bug, a patch must be deployed.
If a patch must be deployed, the system will be taken offline for maintenance.
expected_proof: The network outage was not caused by a hardware fault.
The network outage was caused by a software bug.
A patch must be deployed.
The system will be offline for maintenance.

label: Contrapositive chain — 4-step reverse derivation
goal: Alex is not cleared by security.
seeds: Anyone cleared by security can access the server room.
Anyone who can access the server room can view the classified files.
Anyone who can view classified files holds top-level clearance.
Alex does not hold top-level clearance.
expected_proof: Anyone who does not hold top-level clearance cannot view classified files.
Alex cannot view classified files.
Anyone who cannot view classified files cannot access the server room.
Alex cannot access the server room.
Anyone who cannot access the server room is not cleared by security.
Alex is not cleared by security.

label: Witness credibility — contrapositive then consequence
goal: Witness Morrison's testimony cannot influence the verdict.
seeds: Every witness who testifies truthfully is protected under the witness protection act.
Witness Morrison is not protected under the witness protection act.
Testimony that contains false statements is stricken from the record.
Testimony stricken from the record cannot influence the verdict.
expected_proof: If a witness is not protected under the witness protection act, they did not testify truthfully.
Witness Morrison did not testify truthfully.
Witness Morrison's testimony contains false statements.
Witness Morrison's testimony has been stricken from the record.
Witness Morrison's testimony cannot influence the verdict.

label: Climate treaty — 6-step forward chain
goal: Verdania will attract international manufacturing investment.
seeds: Any nation that ratifies the climate accord must reduce emissions by 30 percent.
Any nation that reduces emissions by 30 percent qualifies for green technology grants.
Any nation that qualifies for green technology grants gains access to low-interest loans.
Any nation with access to low-interest loans can fund large-scale renewable energy projects.
Any nation that funds renewable energy projects sees a significant reduction in energy costs.
Any nation with significantly reduced energy costs attracts international manufacturing investment.
Verdania ratified the climate accord.
expected_proof: Verdania must reduce emissions by 30 percent.
Verdania qualifies for green technology grants.
Verdania gains access to low-interest loans.
Verdania can fund large-scale renewable energy projects.
Verdania sees a significant reduction in energy costs.
Verdania attracts international manufacturing investment.

label: T4 — Unprovable goal (should stall cleanly)
goal: The committee will approve the proposal.
seeds: The meeting was held on a Tuesday.
All committee members received the agenda.
The conference room was booked in advance.

label: Protocol violation — DS identification then 3-step forward chain
goal: All non-essential operations at the facility have been suspended.
seeds: The research halt was caused by either equipment malfunction or a protocol violation.
A post-incident equipment inspection confirmed all devices were functioning within normal parameters.
If the halt was caused by a protocol violation, the lead researcher must file an incident report.
If an incident report is filed, the ethics committee conducts a review.
If the ethics committee conducts a review, all non-essential operations at the facility are suspended pending findings.
expected_proof: The research halt was not caused by equipment malfunction.
The research halt was caused by a protocol violation.
The lead researcher must file an incident report.
The ethics committee must conduct a review.
All non-essential operations at the facility have been suspended.

label: Supplier disqualification — 2-hop contrapositive then 2-step forward chain
goal: Apex Supply Co. has received a formal exclusion notice.
seeds: All registered vendors are on the approved supplier list.
Any vendor on the approved supplier list has completed the vendor onboarding process.
Apex Supply Co. has not completed the vendor onboarding process.
Any vendor that is not a registered vendor cannot submit procurement bids.
Any company that cannot submit procurement bids receives a formal exclusion notice.
expected_proof: If a vendor has not completed the vendor onboarding process, they are not on the approved supplier list.
Apex Supply Co. is not on the approved supplier list.
If a vendor is not on the approved supplier list, they are not a registered vendor.
Apex Supply Co. is not a registered vendor.
Apex Supply Co. cannot submit procurement bids.
Apex Supply Co. has received a formal exclusion notice.
